views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Main hub showing today's commute summary, average times, streak counter, route comparison sparkline, and quick-add FAB. Hero stat is today's total commute time vs personal average.

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-log modal optimized for speed: direction toggle at top, big duration stepper, transport mode icon grid, route picker, traffic condition, optional cost and stress slider. Pre-fills departure time to now.

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Calendar heatmap colored by commute duration (green=fast, red=slow), with date-grouped list below showing each commute with direction badge, duration, route, and transport icon. Filter by direction, mode, route.

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Multi-chart analytics: bar chart of average duration by day-of-week, line chart of weekly trend, pie chart of transport mode distribution, route comparison table ranking routes by avg time, cost summary, and AI-generated insights about optimal departure times and fastest routes.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCommutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All commute entries logged today, sorted by departure time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all commute durations today (both directions)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageCommuteMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Rolling 30-day average commute duration in minutes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days with at least one commute logged

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total commute minutes for the current calendar week

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyTotalMinutes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total commute minutes for the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: fastestRouteStats
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Route with the lowest average duration across all entries, with its average time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestDepartureWindow
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour range (e.g. 7-8) that historically yields the shortest commute times

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weekOverWeekTrend
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change in average commute time vs previous week. Negative means improvement.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: timeSavedThisWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Minutes saved this week compared to personal all-time average multiplied by trip count

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageDurationByDayOfWeek
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Map of weekday (1=Sun..7=Sat) to average commute duration, for bar chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: transportModeDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Breakdown of transport modes used as percentages for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: routeComparison
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All used routes ranked by average duration with trip counts

viewModelComputedProperties.name: monthlyCostTotal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of commute costs for the current month in dollars

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Progress toward daily target commute time (0.0 to 1.0+), based on today's best one-way trip vs goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: activeInsights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamically generated insight strings: optimal route suggestions, departure time tips, cost trends, streak milestones

viewModelComputedProperties.name: ecoTripPercentage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage of commutes this month using eco-friendly modes (bike, walk, scooter, bus, subway, train)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: chartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 30 days of average daily commute duration for trend line chart

dailyGoal.description: Target one-way commute time in minutes. Progress ring fills based on today's best single trip vs this target (at or under = 100%).

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts as active if at least one commute entry (any direction) is logged. Weekends are excluded from streak-breaking unless the user has weekend entries.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare this week's average commute duration against last week's average. Also track 4-week rolling average vs 4-week-prior rolling average for monthly trend. Flag if commute times are trending >10% worse.
insights: Route optimization: 'Your Primary Route averages 34 min vs Alternate 1 at 28 min — consider switching'
Departure timing: 'Leaving before 7:30 AM saves you ~8 minutes on average'
Day-of-week patterns: 'Fridays are your fastest commute day (avg 22 min)'
Cost efficiency: 'Carpooling saves you $45/month compared to driving alone'
Eco impact: '62% of your commutes this month were eco-friendly — up from 48% last month'
Streak milestone: 'You've logged your commute 30 days in a row!'
Time reclaimed: 'By optimizing routes, you saved 47 minutes this week'
Stress correlation: 'Heavy traffic days correlate with 2x higher stress ratings — try the Scenic Route on Tuesdays'
